title: Figure S1 in mtDNA diversity in a rabbit population from Sicily (Italy)
author: Valvo, Mario Lo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure S1. Multiple sequence alignment of Oryctolagus cuniculus cyt b mtDNA from different individuals. GenBank accession numbers are indicated in Table 1. The single enzyme restriction sites are highlighted in colors/gray.
steps_raw: Figure S1. Multiple sequence alignment of Oryctolagus cuniculus cyt b mtDNA from different individuals. GenBank accession numbers are indicated in Table 1. The single enzyme restriction sites are highlighted in colors/gray.
